--- title: "About" pagetitle: "Kai Cooper" description-meta: "Kai Cooper is a PhD student at Wharton studying causal inference in theory and application." main-photo: /files/profiles/kai-headshot.jpg main-photo-square: /files/profiles/kai-headshot-square.jpg title-block-banner: "#CF4446" listing: - id: home-news contents: - "news/**/index.qmd" - "!news/index.qmd" sort: "date desc" type: default max-items: 6 template: html/blog/listing.ejs format: html: quarto-template-params: banner-header-class: "home" --- ```{css echo=FALSE} .home-profile-photo { aspect-ratio: 1 / 1; border-radius: 50%; object-fit: cover; width: 100%; } ``` ::: {.grid} ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-4} ```{=html}
``` ::: ::: {.g-col-12 .g-col-sm-8} Welcome. I'm Kai, a PhD student in the [Operations, Information and Decisions Department](https://oid.wharton.upenn.edu) at [The Wharton School of the University of Pennsylvania](https://www.wharton.upenn.edu/), and an affiliate of the [Centre for Causal Inference](https://dbei.med.upenn.edu/center-of-excellence/cci/) at Penn Biostat. I am fortunate to be advised by [Dean Knox](https://dcknox.github.io). I grew up in Birmingham, UK, but support Arsenal FC. Before joining Penn, I earned a master's degree in mathematics from [Imperial College London](https://www.imperial.ac.uk/mathematics/), including a year studying abroad at the [Ecole polytechnique federale de Lausanne](https://www.epfl.ch/en/) in Switzerland. When not in the office, you'll usually find me at the cinema, playing football or badminton, or reading and watching dystopian science fiction. ::: ::: {.g-col-12} ## Research interests I study **causal inference** in theory and application. My research broadly follows two streams: developing algorithmic partial identification strategies that permit causal inference in challenging data environments, and applying modern causal inference techniques to policy evaluation and fairness in social and institutional settings such as police enforcement and education. ::: ::: {.g-col-12} ## News :::{#home-news} ::: [All news](/news/) ::: :::
